==INTEL==
The INTEL Tree in the [[Time Rift]] contains many tiles that are extremely Intel-expensive to unlock, and can be upgraded many times over. Some of the later tiles in the tree can be upgraded up to 50 times!

As you travel the Temporal Turbulence, you'll visit alternate Dimensions of the [[Realms]] you've already conquered. The Reward Grid in the Time Rift changes its squares depending on which of these Dimensions you're in. Because of this, 8 INTEL Tree tiles upgrade the Reward Grid for their respective Dimensions.

'''Recommended Upgrade:''' Before upgrading individual dimensions, prioritize the center lane (1, 3, and 7). Next, upgrading tile 12 to at least level 3 will unlock Purple Card Conversions, and the [[Gear#Purple-0|Time Flute]]. Combined with gear from the previous [[Time Rift Cards]] tiers, you'll be able to use the [[Gear#Orange-0|Eternal Return]] for +8% DMG and +8% INTEL gained in the Rift.

==Time Rift INTEL Tree - Page 1 - Time Rift==
[[File:Time Rift INTEL Numbered.png|frameless|left]]
{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!No.!!INTEL Name!!Required INTEL!!Effect
|-
| rowspan="4" |1|| rowspan="4" |CrossDimensional Jump
||20k||In the Rift, Travel SPD +4%
|-
||40k||In the Rift, Travel SPD +8%
|-
||60k||In the Rift, Travel SPD +12%
|-
||80k||In the Rift, Travel SPD +16%
|-
| rowspan="6" |2|| rowspan="6" |Koryeon Dimension
||40k||Upgrade a white Apostle Camp to green
|-
||80k||Upgrade a white Hitman Training Camp to green
|-
||120k||Upgrade a white Apostle Camp to blue
|-
||160k||Upgrade a white Hitman Training Camp to blue
|-
||200k||Upgrade a white Apostle Camp to purple
|-
||200k||Upgrade a white Hitman Training Camp to purple
|-

|-

|-

|-

=== Per Rift Apostle INTEL ===
Four tiles in the Time Rift INTEL Tree can be upgraded to level 50 each. Because of this, maxing these Intel tiles will cost a total of 153,600,000 Intel!
In the table below you'll find the effect of each of these Large Upgrades at their corresponding level, as well as the Intel cost of that level alone.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level!!Required INTEL!!Effect!!Life Source!!Chaotic Power!!Infinite Defense!!Beyond Top Speed
|-
||1||160k||Per Rift Apostle defeated...<br>Rift Apostles Defeated: 40/40||Snail HP +60||Snail ATK +6||Snail DEF +6||Snail RUSH +6
|-
||2||320k||Per Rift Apostle defeated...<br>Rift Apostles Defeated: 40/40||Snail HP +120||Snail ATK +12||Snail DEF +12||Snail RUSH +12
|-
||3||480k||Per Rift Apostle defeated...<br>Rift Apostles Defeated: 40/40||Snail HP +180||Snail ATK +18||Snail DEF +18||Snail RUSH +18
|-
||4||640k||Per Rift Apostle defeated...<br>Rift Apostles Defeated: 40/40||Snail HP +240||Snail ATK +24||Snail DEF +24||Snail RUSH +24
|-
||5||800k||Per Rift Apostle defeated...<br>Rift Apostles Defeated: 40/40||Snail HP +300||Snail ATK +30||Snail DEF +30||Snail RUSH +30
|-
||6||800k||Per Rift Apostle defeated...<br>Rift Apostles Defeated: 40/40||Snail HP +360||Snail ATK +36||Snail DEF +36||Snail RUSH +36
|-
||7||800k||Per Rift Apostle defeated...<br>Rift Apostles Defeated: 40/40||Snail HP +420||Snail ATK +42||Snail DEF +42||Snail RUSH +42
|-
||8||800k||Per Rift Apostle defeated...<br>Rift Apostles Defeated: 40/40||Snail HP +480||Snail ATK +48||Snail DEF +48||Snail RUSH +48

==Time Rift INTEL Tree - Page 2 - Immortal Spacetime==
After unlocking 180 INTEL upgrades from Page 1, Page 2 will unlock.

=== Origin of INTEL ===
5 "Origin of..." tiles in the Immortal Spacetime INTEL Tree can be upgraded to level 50 each.

In the table below you'll find the effect of each of these "Origin of..." upgrades at their corresponding level, as well as the Intel cost of that level alone.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level!!Req INTEL!!Origin of Art!!Origin of Culture!!Origin of Tech!!Origin of Fame!!Origin of Faith
|-
||1||120k||ART +40||CIV +40||TECH +40||FAME +40||FTH +40
|-
||2||240k||ART +80||CIV +80||TECH +80||FAME +80||FTH +80
|-
||3||360k||ART +120||CIV +120||TECH +120||FAME +120||FTH +120
|-
||4||480k||ART +160||CIV +160||TECH +160||FAME +160||FTH +160
|-
||5||600k||ART +200||CIV +200||TECH +200||FAME +200||FTH +200
|-
||6||600k||ART +240||CIV +240||TECH +240||FAME +240||FTH +240
|-
||7||600k||ART +280||CIV +280||TECH +280||FAME +280||FTH +280
|-
||8||600k||ART +320||CIV +320||TECH +320||FAME +320||FTH +320
|-
||9||600k||ART +360||CIV +360||TECH +360||FAME +360||FTH +360
|-
||10||600k||ART +400||CIV +400||TECH +400||FAME +400||FTH +400
|-
||11||600k||ART +440||CIV +440||TECH +440||FAME +440||FTH +440
|-
||12||600k||ART +480||CIV +480||TECH +480||FAME +480||FTH +480
|-
||13||600k||ART +520||CIV +520||TECH +520||FAME +520||FTH +520
|-
||14||600k||ART +560||CIV +560||TECH +560||FAME +560||FTH +560
|-

|-
||16||600k||ART +640||CIV +640||TECH +640||FAME +640||FTH +640
|-
||17||600k||ART +680||CIV +680||TECH +680||FAME +680||FTH +680
|-
||18||600k||ART +720||CIV +720||TECH +720||FAME +720||FTH +720
|-
||19||600k||ART +760||CIV +760||TECH +760||FAME +760||FTH +760
|-

|-
||24||600k||ART +960||CIV +960||TECH +960||FAME +960||FTH +960
|-
||25||600k||ART +1,000||CIV +1,000||TECH +1,000||FAME +1,000||FTH +1,000
|-
||26||600k||ART +1,040||CIV +1,040||TECH +1,040||FAME +1,040||FTH +1,040
|-
||27||600k||ART +1,080||CIV +1,080||TECH +1,080||FAME +1,080||FTH +1,080
|-
||28||600k||ART +1,120||CIV +1,120||TECH +1,120||FAME +1,120||FTH +1,120
|-
||29||600k||ART +1,160||CIV +1,160||TECH +1,160||FAME +1,160||FTH +1,160
|-
||30||600k||ART +1,200||CIV +1,200||TECH +1,200||FAME +1,200||FTH +1,200
|-
||31||600k||ART +1,240||CIV +1,240||TECH +1,240||FAME +1,240||FTH +1,240

||50||600k||ART +2,000||CIV +2,000||TECH +2,000||FAME +2,000||FTH +2,000
|}

=== Affinity INTEL ===
5 "...Affinity" tiles in the Immortal Spacetime INTEL Tree can be upgraded to level 100 each.

In the table below you'll find the effect of each of these "...Affinity" upgrades at their corresponding level, as well as the Intel cost of that level alone.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level!!Req INTEL!!Effect!!Earth Affinity!!Fire Affinity!!Poison Affinity!!Water Affinity!!Wind Affinity
|-
||1||160k||Per 5 Rift Apostles Dominated...<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 50/50||Earth Dmg +2<br>Earth Res +2||Fire Dmg +2<br>Fire Res +2||Poison Dmg +2<br>Poison Res +2||Water Dmg +2<br>Water Res +2||Wind Dmg +2<br>Wind Res +2
|-
||2||320k||Per 5 Rift Apostles Dominated...<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 50/50||Earth Dmg +4<br>Earth Res +4||Fire Dmg +4<br>Fire Res +4||Poison Dmg +4<br>Poison Res +4||Water Dmg +4<br>Water Res +4||Wind Dmg +4<br>Wind Res +4
|-

|-

|}

==Time Rift INTEL Tree - Page 3==
After dominating 30 Time Rift Apostles, Page 3 will unlock. All nodes have no max level. Every 10 levels per Circle will switch to other Circle to level up. For example Outer Circle all nodes are at level 10 they can't be upgraded, instead four nodes of Inner Circle can be upgraded. Once the Inner Circle is fully upgraded (all 4 nodes at 10 Levels), it will switch back to Outer Circle. It keeps switching back and forth.

In the Center, it uses 2 Time Protokaryon per level that are obtainable at Rift II, Rift III and Rift IV by defeating and dominating Time Apostles who are significally stronger than previous Rift Apostles.

[[File:Time Rift INTEL Numbered3.png|frameless|left]]
{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!No.!!INTEL Name!!Cost!!Effect
|-
|1 ||Boulder Punishment||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, 800k}}||Earth +3<br>In the Rift, Earth DMG +6
|-
|2||Source Force Infusion||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, 800k}}||Snail HP +300<br>In the Rift, Snail HP +600
|-
|3||Ocean Punishment||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, 800k}}||Water DMG +3<br>In the Rift, Water DMG +6
|-
|4||Source Force Bombing||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, 800k}}||Snail ATK +30<br>In the Rift, Snail ATK +60
|-
|5||Red Lotus Punishment||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, 800k}}||Fire DMG +3<br>In the Rift, Fire DMG +6
|-
|6||Source Force Barrier||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, 800k}}||Snail DEF +300<br>In the Rift, Snail DEF +60
|-
|7||Gale Punishment||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, 800k}}||Wind DMG +3<br>In the Rift, Wind DMG +6
|-
|8||Source Force Shock||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, 800k}}||Snail RUSH +30<br>In the Rift, Snail RUSH +60
|-
|9||Dimensional Reconstruction||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, 800k}}||Snail HP +600<br>Earth DMG +6
|-
|10||Dimensional Shuttle||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, 800k}}||Snail RUSH +60<br>Wind DMG +6
|-
|11||Dimensional Perturbation||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, 800k}}||Snail DEF +60<br> Water DMG +6
|-
|12||Dimensional Cut||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, 800k}}||Snail ATK +60<br>Fire DMG +6
|-
|13||Eternal Curse||{{RewardIconWithText|Time Protokaryon, 2}}||4 ELMT DMG +0.1%<br>Snail HARD Stats +0.1%<br>In the Rift, DMG +1%<br>In the Rift, DMG in Round 1 +1%
|-
}
[[Category:Time Rift]]
